headline: Lightmatter Joins XPO MSA as Founding Member to Accelerate High-Density Optical Interconnects for AI Data Centers
summary: MOUNTAIN VIEW, Calif., March 12, 2026--Lightmatter, the leader in photonic (super)computing, today announced its role as a founding member of the XPO (eXtra-dense Pluggable Optics) Multi-Source Agreement (MSA). Organized by Arista Networks, the XPO MSA aims to define a next-generation optical transceiver form factor designed to meet the massive bandwidth, reliability, and density requirements of hyperscale AI data centers.

headline: Arista Announces XPO High Density Liquid Cooled Pluggable Optics
summary: SANTA CLARA, Calif., March 12, 2026--Arista Networks (NYSE: ANET) today announced the formation of a multi-source agreement (MSA) for XPO, a revolutionary 12.8 Tbps liquid cooled optics module that supports a front panel density of 204.8 Tbps per open compute rack unit, a 4X improvement compared to 1600G-OSFP optics.
